description: Myco boot and senescence rituals. See docs/architecture/L1_CONTRACT/protocol.md for R1 and R2. The Agent runs these automatically; humans never invoke them directly. Uses `python -m myco` so dispatch goes through sys.path (immune to stale `myco` consoles on PATH); `senesce` is the v0.5.3 canonical name for the end-of-session composer, and `session-end` still resolves as a deprecated alias for v0.5.x cached installs.
